feed.title: DzBoom
feed.subtitle: Ent fun channel for super muper dudes

entry.title: Guy Does Handstand at Considerable Height on Moving Tall Wheel During Quarantine

link.title: Guy Does Handstand at Considerable Height on Moving Tall Wheel During Quarantine

entry.content:
This guy performed a handstand at a considerable height, on top of a moving wheel. He made another person walk on the position across his own to maintain balance and walked on his hands to keep the wheel moving. He displayed his brilliant balancing skills and strength successfully.
*The underlying music rights are not available for license. For use of the video with the track(s) contained therein, please contact the music publisher(s) or relevant rightsholder(s).
entry.summary: This guy performed a handstand at a considerable height, on top of a moving wheel. He made another person walk on the position across his own to maintain balance and walked on his hands to keep the wheel moving. He displayed his brilliant balancing skills and strength successfully. *The underlying music rights are not available for license. For use of the video with the track(s) contained therein, please contact the music publisher(s) or relevant rightsholder(s).

entry.title: La famille Dassault au cœur d’un chantage

link.title: La famille Dassault au cœur d’un chantage

entry.content: Serge Dassault, le plaignant, est décédé, à son bureau, le 28 mai 2018, à 93 ans. Mamadou Kébé, le principal « prévenu » , qui avait réussi à lui soutirer plus d’un million d’euros, s’est pendu le 4 janvier 2019, à 38 ans. Restent ses frères cadets, soupçonnés d’être ses complices, qui sont, eux, jugés depuis mercredi à Paris pour tentative d’extorsion de fonds.L’ex-trio familial est accusé d’avoir espionné, harcelé et menacé, par téléphone, depuis 2011 non seulement le patriarche, mais aussi toute sa famille, ses enfants Marie-Hélène, Olivier, Laurent et Thierry, parties civiles, et ses petits-enfants pour obtenir une rallonge de 500 000 euros.
entry.summary: Serge Dassault, le plaignant, est décédé, à son bureau, le 28 mai 2018, à 93 ans. Mamadou Kébé, le principal « prévenu » , qui avait réussi à lui soutirer plus d’un million d’euros, s’est pendu le 4 janvier 2019, à 38 ans. Restent ses frères cadets, soupçonnés d’être ses complices, qui sont, eux, jugés depuis mercredi à Paris pour tentative d’extorsion de fonds.L’ex-trio familial est accusé d’avoir espionné, harcelé et menacé, par téléphone, depuis 2011 non seulement le patriarche, mais aussi toute sa famille, ses enfants Marie-Hélène, Olivier, Laurent et Thierry, parties civiles, et ses petits-enfants pour obtenir une rallonge de 500 000 euros.

entry.title: Rajasthan Politics:Ashok Gehlot सरकार में खटपट,Delhi पहुंचे Deputy CM sachin Pilot वनइंडिया हिंदी

link.title: Rajasthan Politics:Ashok Gehlot सरकार में खटपट,Delhi पहुंचे Deputy CM sachin Pilot वनइंडिया हिंदी

entry.content:
While Rajasthan Chief Minister Ashok Gehlot is engaged in saving his government in Jaipur, Deputy CM Sachin Pilot is on a stay in Delhi. Explain that amid the political upheaval in Rajasthan, Deputy Chief Minister Sachin Pilot has reached Delhi with his MLAs. In such a delicate time, when the CM himself is saying that the BJP wants to topple his government, the absence of deputy CM in Jaipur is raising many questions. It has been reported from sources that Sachin Pilot is meeting with the high command in Delhi. can do.
राजस्थान के मुख्यमंत्री अशोक गहलोत जहां जयपुर में अपनी सरकार बचाने में लगे हुए हैं, वहीं डिप्टी सीएम सचिन पायलट दिल्ली प्रवास पर हैं. बता दें कि राजस्थान में जारी सियासी उठापटक के बीच उपमुख्यमंत्री सचिन पायलट अपने विधायकों के साथ दिल्ली पहुंच चुके हैं. ऐसी नाजुक घड़ी में जब खुद सीएम कह रहे है कि बीजेपी उनकी सरकार को गिराना चाहती है, डिप्टी सीएम का जयपुर में न होना कई सवाल खड़े कर रहा है.वहीं सूत्रों के हवाले से जानकारी मिली है कि सचिन पायलट दिल्ली में आलाकमान के साथ बैठक कर सकते हैं।
#CMAshokGehlot #SachinPilot
entry.summary: While Rajasthan Chief Minister Ashok Gehlot is engaged in saving his government in Jaipur, Deputy CM Sachin Pilot is on a stay in Delhi. Explain that amid the political upheaval in Rajasthan, Deputy Chief Minister Sachin Pilot has reached Delhi with his MLAs. In such a delicate time, when the CM himself is saying that the BJP wants to topple his government, the absence of deputy CM in Jaipur is raising many questions. It has been reported from sources that Sachin Pilot is meeting with the high command in Delhi. can do. राजस्थान के मुख्यमंत्री अशोक गहलोत जहां जयपुर में अपनी सरकार बचाने में लगे हुए हैं, वहीं डिप्टी सीएम सचिन पायलट दिल्ली प्रवास पर हैं. बता दें कि राजस्थान में जारी सियासी उठापटक के बीच उपमुख्यमंत्री सचिन पायलट अपने विधायकों के साथ दिल्ली पहुंच चुके हैं. ऐसी नाजुक घड़ी में जब खुद सीएम कह रहे है कि बीजेपी उनकी सरकार को गिराना चाहती है, डिप्टी सीएम का जयपुर में न होना कई सवाल खड़े कर रहा है.वहीं सूत्रों के हवाले से जानकारी मिली है कि सचिन पायलट दिल्ली में आलाकमान के साथ बैठक कर सकते हैं। #CMAshokGehlot #SachinPilot

entry.title: Curious Little Girl Hears Cookie Wrapper Crinkling And Comes To Look

link.title: Curious Little Girl Hears Cookie Wrapper Crinkling And Comes To Look

entry.content: This little girl loved to have snacks at home. When she heard the crinkling of a wrapper, the toddler curiously sneaked into the room to see where it was coming from. Her dad laughed at her adorableness as she stared at the cookie in his hand.
entry.summary: This little girl loved to have snacks at home. When she heard the crinkling of a wrapper, the toddler curiously sneaked into the room to see where it was coming from. Her dad laughed at her adorableness as she stared at the cookie in his hand.

entry.title: 2011 World Cup final: The Sri Lankan police dropped match-fixing investigation वनइंडिया हिंदी

link.title: 2011 World Cup final: The Sri Lankan police dropped match-fixing investigation वनइंडिया हिंदी

entry.content:
The Sri Lankan police on Friday dropped a match-fixing investigation into the 2011 World Cup final between India and Sri Lanka saying they found no evidence of Sri Lankan players letting India win.The investigation was prompted by former sports minister Mahindananda Aluthgamage who claimed earlier this month that Sri Lanka sold the match to ensure an Indian victory.
श्रीलंका के पूर्व खेल मंत्री महिंदानंदा अलुथगामगे ने आरोप लगाए थे कि 2011 वनडे वर्ल्ड कप फाइनल मैच फिक्स था। इसके बाद श्रीलंका के मौजूदा खेल मंत्री ने इसकी जांच शुरू करवा दी थी, लेकिन अब श्रीलंकाई पुलिस ने साफ कर दिया है कि वर्ल्ड कप फाइनल मैच की फिक्सिंग को लेकर जांच आगे नहीं बढ़ाई जाएगी। पुलिस का कहना है कि सबूतों की कमी की वजह से इस जांच को बंद कर दिया गया है।
#2011WorldCupfinal #SriLankanpolice #Matchfixing
entry.summary: The Sri Lankan police on Friday dropped a match-fixing investigation into the 2011 World Cup final between India and Sri Lanka saying they found no evidence of Sri Lankan players letting India win.The investigation was prompted by former sports minister Mahindananda Aluthgamage who claimed earlier this month that Sri Lanka sold the match to ensure an Indian victory. श्रीलंका के पूर्व खेल मंत्री महिंदानंदा अलुथगामगे ने आरोप लगाए थे कि 2011 वनडे वर्ल्ड कप फाइनल मैच फिक्स था। इसके बाद श्रीलंका के मौजूदा खेल मंत्री ने इसकी जांच शुरू करवा दी थी, लेकिन अब श्रीलंकाई पुलिस ने साफ कर दिया है कि वर्ल्ड कप फाइनल मैच की फिक्सिंग को लेकर जांच आगे नहीं बढ़ाई जाएगी। पुलिस का कहना है कि सबूतों की कमी की वजह से इस जांच को बंद कर दिया गया है। #2011WorldCupfinal #SriLankanpolice #Matchfixing

entry.title: China VS America China-விற்கு எதிராக பெரிய நடவடிக்கை எடுக்கும் America White House

link.title: China VS America China-விற்கு எதிராக பெரிய நடவடிக்கை எடுக்கும் America White House

entry.content:
சீனாவிற்கு எதிராக மிகப்பெரிய நடவடிக்கை எடுக்க அமெரிக்கா முடிவு செய்துள்ளது. வெள்ளை மாளிகை இதை உறுதி செய்துள்ள நிலையில் அதிபர் டிரம்ப் இது தொடர்பாக அறிவிக்க இருக்கிறார்.
US President Trump is going to announce something big on China soon.
#Trump
#AmericaChinaFight
entry.summary: சீனாவிற்கு எதிராக மிகப்பெரிய நடவடிக்கை எடுக்க அமெரிக்கா முடிவு செய்துள்ளது. வெள்ளை மாளிகை இதை உறுதி செய்துள்ள நிலையில் அதிபர் டிரம்ப் இது தொடர்பாக அறிவிக்க இருக்கிறார். US President Trump is going to announce something big on China soon. #Trump #AmericaChinaFight

entry.title: Une foule importante rassemblée à Nice pour le concert du DJ The Avener

link.title: Une foule importante rassemblée à Nice pour le concert du DJ The Avener

entry.content: Des images qui illustrent sans doute un certain relâchement dans le respect des gestes barrières. Une foule importante s’est rassemblée samedi soir au bout de la promenade des Anglais à Nice pour assister à un concert du DJ The Avener. Les personnes présentes étaient très proches les unes des autres et toutes ne portaient pas de masque.
entry.summary: Des images qui illustrent sans doute un certain relâchement dans le respect des gestes barrières. Une foule importante s’est rassemblée samedi soir au bout de la promenade des Anglais à Nice pour assister à un concert du DJ The Avener. Les personnes présentes étaient très proches les unes des autres et toutes ne portaient pas de masque.

entry.title: Menteri BUMN Serahkan Bantuan Penanganan Covid-19 Kepada Pemerintah Jatim

link.title: Menteri BUMN Serahkan Bantuan Penanganan Covid-19 Kepada Pemerintah Jatim

entry.content:
SURABAYA, KOMPAS.TV - Menteri Badan Usaha Milik Negara (BUMN) Republik Indonesia, Erick Thohir, menyerahkan bantuan berupa obat-obatan dan alat kesehatan kepada Gugus Tugas Covid-19 Propinsi Jawa Timur.
Bantuan yang diserahkan berupa 10.000 Alat Pengaman Diri (APD), 100.000 Masker Bedah, dan 100.000 Tablet Avigan. Erick didampingi Menkopolhukam RI Mahfud MD dan Gubernur Jawa Timur Khofifah Indar Parawansa.
Bantuan dari Kementerian BUMN ini terkait status propinsi Jawa Timur yang masih menempati posisi teratas dengan tingkat penyebaran virus corona tertinggi di Indonesia. Erick mengatakan bawah penyerahan bantun sudah sesuai arahan Presiden bahwa Jawa Timur memerlukan perhatian khusus dalam penanganan Covid-19.
Bantuan ini diharapkan dapat menekan angka kematian akibat Covid-19 di Jawa Timur. Propinsi Jawa Timur sebelumnya juga telah menerima bantuan ratusan ribu tablet obat Avigan dari Persatuan Rumah Sakit BUMN.
Dengan adanya bantuan obat Avigan, setidaknya terdapat lebih dari 2000 pasien positif Corona yang berpotensi besar untuk sembuh.
entry.summary: SURABAYA, KOMPAS.TV - Menteri Badan Usaha Milik Negara (BUMN) Republik Indonesia, Erick Thohir, menyerahkan bantuan berupa obat-obatan dan alat kesehatan kepada Gugus Tugas Covid-19 Propinsi Jawa Timur. Bantuan yang diserahkan berupa 10.000 Alat Pengaman Diri (APD), 100.000 Masker Bedah, dan 100.000 Tablet Avigan. Erick didampingi Menkopolhukam RI Mahfud MD dan Gubernur Jawa Timur Khofifah Indar Parawansa. Bantuan dari Kementerian BUMN ini terkait status propinsi Jawa Timur yang masih menempati posisi teratas dengan tingkat penyebaran virus corona tertinggi di Indonesia. Erick mengatakan bawah penyerahan bantun sudah sesuai arahan Presiden bahwa Jawa Timur memerlukan perhatian khusus dalam penanganan Covid-19. Bantuan ini diharapkan dapat menekan angka kematian akibat Covid-19 di Jawa Timur. Propinsi Jawa Timur sebelumnya juga telah menerima bantuan ratusan ribu tablet obat Avigan dari Persatuan Rumah Sakit BUMN. Dengan adanya bantuan obat Avigan, setidaknya terdapat lebih dari 2000 pasien positif Corona yang berpotensi besar untuk sembuh.

entry.title: The One and Only Ivan Trailer 08 14 2020

link.title: The One and Only Ivan Trailer 08 14 2020

entry.content:
The One and Only Ivan (Walt Disney Pictures) Stars: Phillipa Soo, Sam Rockwell, Angelina Jolie
A gorilla named Ivan tries to piece together his past with the help of an elephant named Stella as they hatch a plan to escape from captivity.
Director: Thea Sharrock
Writers: Katherine Applegate (book), Mike White (screenplay)
entry.summary: The One and Only Ivan (Walt Disney Pictures) Stars: Phillipa Soo, Sam Rockwell, Angelina Jolie A gorilla named Ivan tries to piece together his past with the help of an elephant named Stella as they hatch a plan to escape from captivity. Director: Thea Sharrock Writers: Katherine Applegate (book), Mike White (screenplay)

entry.title: TikTok May Re Entry In India - TikTok Headquarters To Move From China Oneindia Telugu

link.title: TikTok May Re Entry In India - TikTok Headquarters To Move From China Oneindia Telugu

entry.content:
ByteDance might be move tiktok headquarters from china considering to change its corporate structure. Chinese giant Bytedance is considering changing the corporate structure of its popular short video app TikTok.
#TikTokinindia
#ByteDance
#tiktokheadquarterschina
#TikTokIndiaEmployees
#tiktokcorporatestructure
#chinaapps
#chineseappsindia
#TikTokvideos
#ChinesegiantBytedance
#indiachinastandoff
#టిక్ టాక్
ఇటీవల భారత్‌లో నిషేధానికి గురైన చైనీస్ యాప్ టిక్‌టాక్ తమ కార్పోరేట్ స్ట్రక్చర్‌ను మార్చే యోచనలో ఉంది. టిక్‌టాక్ ఎదుగుదలకు ‘చైనా’ ట్యాగ్ అడ్డురావద్దని దాని మాతృసంస్థ బైట్‌డ్యాన్స్ భావిస్తోంది. ఇందుకోసం టిక్‌టాక్ హెడ్ క్వార్టర్స్‌ను చైనా నుంచి వేరే దేశానికి మార్చాలని భావిస్తోంది.
entry.summary: ByteDance might be move tiktok headquarters from china considering to change its corporate structure. Chinese giant Bytedance is considering changing the corporate structure of its popular short video app TikTok. #TikTokinindia #ByteDance #tiktokheadquarterschina #TikTokIndiaEmployees #tiktokcorporatestructure #chinaapps #chineseappsindia #TikTokvideos #ChinesegiantBytedance #indiachinastandoff #టిక్ టాక్ ఇటీవల భారత్‌లో నిషేధానికి గురైన చైనీస్ యాప్ టిక్‌టాక్ తమ కార్పోరేట్ స్ట్రక్చర్‌ను మార్చే యోచనలో ఉంది. టిక్‌టాక్ ఎదుగుదలకు ‘చైనా’ ట్యాగ్ అడ్డురావద్దని దాని మాతృసంస్థ బైట్‌డ్యాన్స్ భావిస్తోంది. ఇందుకోసం టిక్‌టాక్ హెడ్ క్వార్టర్స్‌ను చైనా నుంచి వేరే దేశానికి మార్చాలని భావిస్తోంది.

entry.title: Where to See Fireworks This 4th of July

link.title: Where to See Fireworks This 4th of July

entry.content: Are your fireworks cancelled this year? Not to fear, NBC’s 44th annual ‘Macy’s 4th of July Spectacular’ has got you covered complete with performances by the Black Eyed Peas, the Killers, Lady A, John Legend, Tim McGraw and Brad Paisley.
entry.summary: Are your fireworks cancelled this year? Not to fear, NBC’s 44th annual ‘Macy’s 4th of July Spectacular’ has got you covered complete with performances by the Black Eyed Peas, the Killers, Lady A, John Legend, Tim McGraw and Brad Paisley.

entry.title: Jimmie Johnson cleared for return at Kentucky Speedway

link.title: Jimmie Johnson cleared for return at Kentucky Speedway

entry.content: Jimmie Johnson has been cleared to return to competition after meeting the criteria established by NASCAR officials since the sport returned to action in May after the coronavirus outbreak.
entry.summary: Jimmie Johnson has been cleared to return to competition after meeting the criteria established by NASCAR officials since the sport returned to action in May after the coronavirus outbreak.

entry.title: Direct Descendant Of Thomas Jefferson Wants Harriet Tubman Statue To Replace DC’s Jefferson Memorial

link.title: Direct Descendant Of Thomas Jefferson Wants Harriet Tubman Statue To Replace DC’s Jefferson Memorial

entry.content:
Thomas Jefferson’s direct descendant is calling for changing regarding his family’s legacy.
He wants the Washington, DC memorial dedicated to the third president to be taken down.
Lucian K. Truscott IV wrote that Jefferson’s memorial should be replaced with one to Harriet Tubman.
"To see a 19-foot-tall bronze statue of a Black woman, who was a slave and also a patriot, in place of a white man who enslaved hundreds of men and women is not erasing history." Lucian K. Truscott IV
Truscott says the nationwide conversation on racism and white supremacy inspired his thoughts.
entry.summary: Thomas Jefferson’s direct descendant is calling for changing regarding his family’s legacy. He wants the Washington, DC memorial dedicated to the third president to be taken down. Lucian K. Truscott IV wrote that Jefferson’s memorial should be replaced with one to Harriet Tubman. "To see a 19-foot-tall bronze statue of a Black woman, who was a slave and also a patriot, in place of a white man who enslaved hundreds of men and women is not erasing history." Lucian K. Truscott IV Truscott says the nationwide conversation on racism and white supremacy inspired his thoughts.

entry.title: Top 10 Creepiest Things Found in the Backgrounds of Movie Scenes

link.title: Top 10 Creepiest Things Found in the Backgrounds of Movie Scenes

entry.content: Did anybody else see that? For this list, we’ll be looking at various creepy things that can be found in the background of various movies, particularly thrillers or horror films.
entry.summary: Did anybody else see that? For this list, we’ll be looking at various creepy things that can be found in the background of various movies, particularly thrillers or horror films.

entry.title: WHO ಹಾಡಿ ಹೊಗಳಿದ ಚೀನಾ Oneindia Kannada

link.title: WHO ಹಾಡಿ ಹೊಗಳಿದ ಚೀನಾ Oneindia Kannada

entry.content:
ವಿಶ್ವ ಆರೋಗ್ಯ ಸಂಸ್ಥೆಯನ್ನು ಸಮರ್ಥಿಸಿಕೊಂಡ ಚೀನಾ ಅದರ ಕಾರ್ಯಚಟುವಟಿಕೆಯನ್ನು ಶ್ಲಾಘಿಸಿದ ರೀತಿ ಅನೇಕ ಪ್ರಶ್ನೆಗಳನ್ನು ಹುಟ್ಟುಹಾಕಿದೆ. 
China recently praised WHO and spoke against US fir leaving World health organisation
entry.summary: ವಿಶ್ವ ಆರೋಗ್ಯ ಸಂಸ್ಥೆಯನ್ನು ಸಮರ್ಥಿಸಿಕೊಂಡ ಚೀನಾ ಅದರ ಕಾರ್ಯಚಟುವಟಿಕೆಯನ್ನು ಶ್ಲಾಘಿಸಿದ ರೀತಿ ಅನೇಕ ಪ್ರಶ್ನೆಗಳನ್ನು ಹುಟ್ಟುಹಾಕಿದೆ. China recently praised WHO and spoke against US fir leaving World health organisation

entry.title: Dans son podcast ‘Mes 14 ans’, elle raconte les premiers pas de sa sexualité

link.title: Dans son podcast ‘Mes 14 ans’, elle raconte les premiers pas de sa sexualité

entry.content:
Lucie Mikaelian a ressorti son journal intime tenu lorsqu’elle avait 14 ans. Elle a décidé de l’adapter en podcast dans lequel elle explore les débuts de sa sexualité.
Retrouver toutes les infos sur la vidéo sur :
entry.summary: Lucie Mikaelian a ressorti son journal intime tenu lorsqu’elle avait 14 ans. Elle a décidé de l’adapter en podcast dans lequel elle explore les débuts de sa sexualité. Retrouver toutes les infos sur la vidéo sur :

entry.title: WATCH: Call for Justice

link.title: WATCH: Call for Justice

entry.content:
Manila Court employees and members of the Prosecutors League of Manila conduct an indoor protest in the hallway of the Manila Trial Court inside the Manila City Hall to call for justice and condemn the murder of Manila City Prosecutor, Jovencio Senados.
Video by: Enrique Agcaoili
entry.summary: Manila Court employees and members of the Prosecutors League of Manila conduct an indoor protest in the hallway of the Manila Trial Court inside the Manila City Hall to call for justice and condemn the murder of Manila City Prosecutor, Jovencio Senados. Video by: Enrique Agcaoili

entry.title: Shadow tourism minister Alex Sobel visits Morecambe

link.title: Shadow tourism minister Alex Sobel visits Morecambe

entry.content:
Shadow tourism minister Alex Sobel visits Morecambe
Shadow tourism minister Alex Sobel visits Morecambe
Shadow tourism minister Alex Sobel visits Morecambe
entry.summary: Shadow tourism minister Alex Sobel visits Morecambe Shadow tourism minister Alex Sobel visits Morecambe Shadow tourism minister Alex Sobel visits Morecambe

entry.title: Lempar Kode Pengawasan Bank dari OJK ke Bank Indonesia

link.title: Lempar Kode Pengawasan Bank dari OJK ke Bank Indonesia

entry.content:
KOMPAS.TV - Isu dikembalikannya pengawasan perbankan dari OJK ke BI tiba-tiba muncul.
Berdasarkan informasi dari reuters, Presiden Joko Widodo sedang mempertimbangkan mengeluarkan dekrit darurat untuk mengembalikan regulasi perbankan dari OJK ke bank sentral alias Bank Indonesia.
Kita ke OJK dulu.
Jadi kalau OJK itu tugasnya mengatur dan mengawasi lembaga perbankan, lembaga non-bank seperti asuransi, dana pensiun, multifinance, dan juga pasar modal.
Model ini sebenarnya mengikuti sistem regulasi jasa keuangan di Inggris.
Sebelumnya industri perbankan ini ada di BI, dan baru dipindah ke OJK di akhir 2013.
Lalu apa tugas BI?
Jadi kalau dilihat secara umum, benang merah perbedaan BI dan OJK terutama di perbankan, BI mengatur secara makro yang akan berdampak langsung dan ga langsung terhadap kestabilan moneter.
sementara OJK mengatur perbankan secara langsung yang dampaknya langsung ke perbankan atau secara mikro.
Sinyal pengembalian otoritas ke perbankan ini menurut DPR juga sudah diajukan untuk masuk program legislasi nasional, prolegnas.
Bahkan sudah disetujui badan legislasi DPR kemarin.
Di informasi awal, isu pengembalian fungsi ini karena presiden ga puas dengan kerja ojk sepanjang pandemic, berarti bicara soal restrukturisasi.
Apabila restrukturisasi kredit dilakukan dengan cara pemberian tambahan kredit, tujuan dan penggunaan tambahan kredit tersebut harus jelas.
entry.summary: KOMPAS.TV - Isu dikembalikannya pengawasan perbankan dari OJK ke BI tiba-tiba muncul. Berdasarkan informasi dari reuters, Presiden Joko Widodo sedang mempertimbangkan mengeluarkan dekrit darurat untuk mengembalikan regulasi perbankan dari OJK ke bank sentral alias Bank Indonesia. Kita ke OJK dulu. Jadi kalau OJK itu tugasnya mengatur dan mengawasi lembaga perbankan, lembaga non-bank seperti asuransi, dana pensiun, multifinance, dan juga pasar modal. Model ini sebenarnya mengikuti sistem regulasi jasa keuangan di Inggris. Sebelumnya industri perbankan ini ada di BI, dan baru dipindah ke OJK di akhir 2013. Lalu apa tugas BI? Jadi kalau dilihat secara umum, benang merah perbedaan BI dan OJK terutama di perbankan, BI mengatur secara makro yang akan berdampak langsung dan ga langsung terhadap kestabilan moneter. sementara OJK mengatur perbankan secara langsung yang dampaknya langsung ke perbankan atau secara mikro. Sinyal pengembalian otoritas ke perbankan ini menurut DPR juga sudah diajukan untuk masuk program legislasi nasional, prolegnas. Bahkan sudah disetujui badan legislasi DPR kemarin. Di informasi awal, isu pengembalian fungsi ini karena presiden ga puas dengan kerja ojk sepanjang pandemic, berarti bicara soal restrukturisasi. Apabila restrukturisasi kredit dilakukan dengan cara pemberian tambahan kredit, tujuan dan penggunaan tambahan kredit tersebut harus jelas.

entry.title: FedEx Calls For Washington Redskins To Change Name

link.title: FedEx Calls For Washington Redskins To Change Name

entry.content:
According to CNN Business, FedEx, a major sponsor of the Washington Redskins, has asked the NFL team to change its name.
This comes after mounting pressure from investors who oppose the name’s racist connotations.
FedEx said that over 80 groups and shareholders that invest in them demanded that FedEx CEO Frederick Smith "terminate its business and public relationships" with the franchise because of the name.
FedEx sponsors and has naming rights for the stadium the Washington Redskins plays in.
Similar investor letters were also sent to the CEOs of Nike, which produces the Redskins uniforms and equipment, and Pepsi, its snack and beverage partner.
Investors credited the Black Lives Matter movement for shining light on centuries of systemic racism.
Investors added, "It is time for FedEx to meet the magnitude of this moment, to make their opposition to the racist team name clear, and to take tangible and meaningful steps.."
entry.summary: According to CNN Business, FedEx, a major sponsor of the Washington Redskins, has asked the NFL team to change its name. This comes after mounting pressure from investors who oppose the name’s racist connotations. FedEx said that over 80 groups and shareholders that invest in them demanded that FedEx CEO Frederick Smith "terminate its business and public relationships" with the franchise because of the name. FedEx sponsors and has naming rights for the stadium the Washington Redskins plays in. Similar investor letters were also sent to the CEOs of Nike, which produces the Redskins uniforms and equipment, and Pepsi, its snack and beverage partner. Investors credited the Black Lives Matter movement for shining light on centuries of systemic racism. Investors added, "It is time for FedEx to meet the magnitude of this moment, to make their opposition to the racist team name clear, and to take tangible and meaningful steps.."

entry.title: Cayetano: ABS-CBN franchise not about press freedom but big business meddling with media

link.title: Cayetano: ABS-CBN franchise not about press freedom but big business meddling with media

entry.content: Cayetano argues during the 13th joint House committee hearing on Thursday, July 9, that the main issue surrounding ABS-CBN’s franchise is that of broadcast company owners possibly using the media to protect their business interests. Read:
entry.summary: Cayetano argues during the 13th joint House committee hearing on Thursday, July 9, that the main issue surrounding ABS-CBN’s franchise is that of broadcast company owners possibly using the media to protect their business interests. Read:
